mapper.select: select warehouse_id from sb_work_group_warehouse where group_id = #{groupId} and delete_time is null
mapper.update: update sb_work_group_warehouse set delete_by = #{deleteBy}, delete_time = sysdate() where group_id = #{groupId}
mapper.insert: insert into sb_work_group_warehouse (id, group_id, warehouse_id, customer_id, create_by, create_time) values (#{id}, #{groupId}, #{warehouseId}, #{customerId}, #{createBy}, sysdate())

insert into sb_work_group_warehouse (id, group_id, warehouse_id, customer_id, create_by, create_time) values
(#{item.id}, #{item.groupId}, #{item.warehouseId}, #{item.customerId}, #{item.createBy}, sysdate())
